extraction.one_line_summary: MADRAZO Angel won stage 5 after being dropped three times on the final climb, attacking inside 500m to beat breakaway companions.
tactical_patterns: Burgos-BH planted two riders in breakaway specifically to defend polka-dot jersey through points control, sacrificing stage hunting.
MADRAZO repeatedly dropped then fought back three times before winning, showing recovery between efforts matters more than instantaneous strength.
LOPEZ Miguel Angel attacked GC group on summit finish to reclaim red jersey, signaling deliberate leadership ambitions over conservative racing.
Astana tempo on approach to final climb fragmented peloton through narrow roads, creating selection before climb even started.

rider_signals.MADRAZO Angel: positive: Won despite appearing weakest in breakaway throughout climb, superior recovery between efforts and tactical patience
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Attacked for bonus seconds and stage placing to reclaim red jersey, showing aggressive GC intent early in race
rider_signals.ROSCH Nicolas: positive: Defended red jersey far beyond expected capability on summit finish as non-climber, lost only 7 seconds to LOPEZ
rider_signals.HARADA Jetse: negative: Dropped by MADRAZO in final 500m despite sitting on wheel for 10km, tactical positioning without finishing power
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: Finished 7 seconds behind LOPEZ, conservative positioning suggests waiting for later GC opportunities
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Paced ROGLIC throughout climb as domestique, Jumbo-Visma willing to burn climbers early for GC positioning
